title: Steve Pickersgill
extract: Steve Pickersgill (born 28 November 1985) is an English former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 2000s and 2010s. He played at representative level for England (Academy), and at club level for Crosfields ARLFC (in Warrington), and in the Super League for the Warrington Wolves, and the Widnes Vikings, as a prop, or second-row.
